compiled_state.title: Sprint sub-agents launched 'in parallel' must use run_in_background or they execute serially
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: When the sprint skill says 'Launch ALL sub-agents in the batch within a single message (parallel tool calls)', the Agent tool calls must use run_in_background=true. Without it, foreground Agent calls block until they return — so launching 4 agents in one message still executes them serially (each waits for the previous to finish). The sprint skill and task-execution template should specify run_in_background=true for parallel batch dispatch. Observed in d775-4a36 batch 2: agents 1a0b-3955 and 8385-dd5b ran to completion before 1e54-d343 and 1f62-9131 started (the latter two ended up as background agents only because of async dispatch timing).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: added run_in_background: true to batch dispatch instructions in sprint and debug-everything skills, preventing serial execution of parallel sub-agents
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
